name: Digital Vint
description: Digital Vint is a results-driven digital marketing and web design agency in Hyderabad, India. We help local businesses attract customers, generate leads, and grow online through lead-generating websites, local SEO, paid ads, and e-commerce solutions.

itemOffered.name: Lead-Generating Business Websites
itemOffered.description: Fast, mobile-friendly websites designed to convert visitors into enquiries, calls, and WhatsApp messages.

itemOffered.name: Local SEO & Online Visibility
itemOffered.description: Google Rankings, Google Business Profile optimisation, and local keyword targeting to attract nearby customers.

itemOffered.name: Paid Ads for Faster Leads
itemOffered.description: Targeted Google Ads and social media advertising campaigns generating immediate, high-quality leads.

itemOffered.name: E-Commerce for Local & Growing Businesses
itemOffered.description: Simple, scalable online stores built on Shopify and WooCommerce with UPI and Indian payment integrations.
